ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the player has been in the league */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status and expected return date (e.g., 'Out for 2 weeks') */,
  "college" TEXT /* College from which the player graduated */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_number" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., New York Knicks) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (e.g., New York) */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Team's social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the game was played in */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referees" TEXT /* Names of the referees officiating the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy league */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the fantasy league */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., public, private) */,
  "entry_fee" INTEGER /* Entry fee for joining the league */,
  "prize_pool" INTEGER /* Total prize pool for the league */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the league starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the league ends */,
  "max_teams" INTEGER /* Maximum number of teams allowed in the league */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules of the league (e.g., scoring system, draft type) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_leagues_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fantasy league this team belongs to */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the fantasy team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "roster_size" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed on the team */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Draft position of the team in the league */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES fantasy_leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
